message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column take/slice/concat/repeat parity (frankenpandas-w3ji)

Adds four fundamental positional operations on Column plus a new
ColumnError::DTypeMismatch variant to carry dtype conflicts.

- take(indices) — integer gather; out-of-range index returns
  ColumnError::LengthMismatch carrying the offending index.
- slice(start, len) — contiguous view; start past end yields an
  empty column with the same dtype; len is clamped to the tail
  so callers don't need to measure first.
- concat(other) — appends preserving dtype; mixed dtypes return
  the new ColumnError::DTypeMismatch.
- repeat(n) — per-element contiguous repetition; n=0 yields an
  empty same-dtype column, n=1 clones.

Co-lands frankenpandas-vzqy (slice), hnf3 (concat), g8v6 (repeat).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
